narrative_constraints.statement: Facade greening is required or encouraged using climbing plants and facade gardens (geveltuinen).

reasons: This is a beeldkwaliteitplan reference image page; captions describe design intentions but without binding rule text.
No explicit regulatory clause present, only image captions.

narrative_constraints.statement: Waterway banks should be designed in a nature-friendly manner with flower-rich grassland (bloemrijkgrasland).

reasons: Image caption from beeldkwaliteitplan; expresses design intent but no binding regels clause present.
Likely a design guideline rather than a hard rule.

narrative_constraints.statement: Play elements should provide play guidance/challenge (speelaanleiding) rather than standalone play objects.

reasons: Image caption in beeldkwaliteitplan; expresses design preference without binding clause.
i.p.v. = in plaats van (instead of), indicating a preference over standard play objects.

narrative_constraints.statement: Bridges should be designed for slow traffic and should be recognisable/distinctive in appearance.

reasons: Image caption in beeldkwaliteitplan; expresses design quality intent without binding clause.

narrative_constraints.statement: Tree planting should feature diversity in species, including multi-stemmed and tall-standard (hoogstam) trees.

provenance.quoted_text: Diversiteit in bomen. Verschillende soorten, meerstammig en hoogstam

reasons: Image caption in beeldkwaliteitplan; expresses planting design intent without binding regulatory text.
